session_context: Agent discovered tightly-coupled auth handler while implementing JWT authentication

expected_issue.title: Refactor auth handler for testability
expected_issue.context: During JWT implementation work, discovered the auth handler is tightly coupled to the Phoenix controller layer. This makes it difficult to test in isolation and increases the risk of bugs when adding new auth methods. Refactoring to separate business logic from web layer would improve maintainability and test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Auth logic extracted to separate Deft.Auth module
Unit tests can run without Phoenix.ConnTest
Controller only handles HTTP concerns (parsing, status codes)
